name: Smuggler Crew
description: Professionals who move illegal goods. Prefer evasion over violence but aren't helpless.

sensory.sight: a lantern signal on a dark road, answered by another from the treeline
sensory.sound: wagon wheels muffled with cloth, whispered directions
sensory.smell: exotic spices, or something chemical, seeping through crate slats
sensory.feel: the tension of people doing something they shouldn't, efficiently

encounter_hooks: wagon tracks that veer off the road into the forest, then vanish
a merchant selling goods far too cheaply, with no questions about provenance
a coded message found on a captured bandit, addressed to nobody
notes: Smugglers are often more useful alive than dead. They know routes, contacts, and secrets. In Threadhallow, smugglers might traffic wardthread, Fray-touched materials, or restricted Archive texts.
